tweets.full_text:
The simplest way to use privacy on Solana

1. Transfer funds privately using @solflare

Their Privacy Aggregator Layer routes through @HoudiniSwap

Just switch from public to private before signing the transaction

2. Trade privately using @Titan_Exchange, powered by @vanishTrade

Once you've sent funds privately, connect to Titan, choose Private mode, deposit to your Vanish wallet and start swapping

You can stay private while using your favorite protocols

tweets.full_text:
Did you know leveraged ETFs are one of the fastest-growing segments in TradFi?

Since 2022, trading volume has grown 29% annually and now represents 8% of total U.S. market trading.

Nearly 90% of that volume is driven by retail. That’s $150B+ in AUM chasing leveraged exposure.

Hylo V2.0 is bringing the infrastructure rails to DeFi with xAssets, and it’s happening on @solana.

Like leveraged ETFs, xAssets offer 2–4x exposure to the underlying without TradFi constraints.

• Minimal ongoing costs
• Lower volatility decay
• Flat, predictable fees
• Self-custodial
• Permissionless
• Composable
• 24/7 trading 

Solana is becoming the home of on-chain trading. Hylo is where leveraged finance will live.
tweets.name: Hylo

Nearly 90% of that volume is driven by retail. That’s $150B+ in AUM chasing leveraged exposure.

Hylo V2.0 is bringing the infrastructure rails to DeFi with xAssets, and it’s happening on @solana.

Like leveraged ETFs, xAssets offer 2–4x exposure to the underlying without TradFi constraints.

• Minimal ongoing costs
• Lower volatility decay
• Flat, predictable fees
• Self-custodial
• Permissionless
• Composable
• 24/7 trading 

Solana is becoming the home of on-chain trading. Hylo is where leveraged finance will live.

tweets.full_text:
I definitely agree with this notion.

But perps aren’t a fad. It’s where big traders and hyper gamblers go to do the most volume. 6x more than spot, currently. It’s an important vertical.

The solana economy is well rounded, but we still need to be competitive in every segment and provide great products and deep liquidity across all of them. Right now we aren’t competitive at all on perps. 

Building spot markets is a long and slow process for equities, commodities etc. It has to be custodied to mint on chain. Legal barriers exist. The total value of tokenized equities on Solana is extremely low, because of this.

To become the global financial layer, we still need better perps products.

Luckily, work is being done that will make this possible.
tweets.name: chase

result.text:
I definitely agree with this notion.

But perps aren’t a fad. It’s where big traders and hyper gamblers go to do the most volume. 6x more than spot, currently. It’s an important vertical.

The solana economy is well rounded, but we still need to be competitive in every segment and provide great products and deep liquidity across all of them. Right now we aren’t competitive at all on perps. 

Building spot markets is a long and slow process for equities, commodities etc. It has to be custodied to mint on chain. Legal barriers exist. The total value of tokenized equities on Solana is extremely low, because of this.

To become the global financial layer, we still need better perps products.

Luckily, work is being done that will make this possible.

legacy.full_text:
I think CT has perps psychosis the same way many have AI psychosis

We absolutely need to be competitive in derivatives on Solana

But it is not the only game, far from it

Solana is a complete economy, and it’s #1 or #2 across many surfaces, from spot DEX, to AI and payments and

result.text:
I think CT has perps psychosis the same way many have AI psychosis

We absolutely need to be competitive in derivatives on Solana

But it is not the only game, far from it

Solana is a complete economy, and it’s #1 or #2 across many surfaces, from spot DEX, to AI and payments and RWAs and stables, lending, DePIN, consumer, amongst many other categories 

Some chains have the luxury of marketing to a specific niche of the market, but Solana is 1 of 2 chains (the other being Eth) that can credibly compete for everything and win

Release from @SolanaFndn crisis comms:

We do not condone the statements made by the Solana Foundation President @calilyliu. These statements, while factually correct and extremely based, have done irreparable harm to our gaming ecosystem.

As a punishment, Lily has been asked to play all of the current games built on Solana.

tweets.full_text:
There is a false assumption that Solana needs to “win perps”.

The reality is that no one wins everything.

A general purpose blockchain has to make tradeoffs to accommodate multiple usecases.

Solana simply needs to be competitive on perps, and everything else.

You don’t need to win them all. But you need to have an environment that allows every team to have a chance to be competitive.

20% marketshare in every segment of DeFi is more valuable than 100% of marketshare in one.

You want your retail investors to be able to use your chain for everything without have to open a new tab to use another blockchain for a usecase you don’t support.

This is how you become the global financial layer.
tweets.name: chase

result.text:
There is a false assumption that Solana needs to “win perps”.

The reality is that no one wins everything.

A general purpose blockchain has to make tradeoffs to accommodate multiple usecases.

Solana simply needs to be competitive on perps, and everything else.

You don’t need to win them all. But you need to have an environment that allows every team to have a chance to be competitive.

20% marketshare in every segment of DeFi is more valuable than 100% of marketshare in one.

You want your retail investors to be able to use your chain for everything without have to open a new tab to use another blockchain for a usecase you don’t support.

This is how you become the global financial layer.

data.preview_translation:
With the TGE just around the corner, what is @Backpack founder/CEO @armaniferrante thinking right now? What are the full details of its future growth strategy and new products? Reasons for expectations in the US, Japan, and EU respectively.

And why carry out the token-to-equity
data.translation:
With the TGE just around the corner, what is @Backpack founder/CEO @armaniferrante thinking right now? What are the full details of its future growth strategy and new products? Reasons for expectations in the US, Japan, and EU respectively.

And why carry out the token-to-equity conversion? 🎒

This long interview clarifies the challenges Backpack solves and the roots of the value it provides. Backpack fundamentally overturns the concept of cryptocurrency exchanges.
_______________
00:00 Introduction and Armani's introduction 
00:48 How he feels about the TGE 
01:35 History and challenges of the current financial system 
05:32 New issues in the modern stock market 
08:24 Innovations blockchain brings to financial markets 
13:00 Reasons for doing token-to-stock exchange 
19:38 Plans after TGE: About token supply 
22:40 Expected new product ①: Prediction Market 
26:20 Expected new product ②: Providing real stock trading functionality 
33:35 Reasons for insisting on real stock products rather than stock derivative products 
36:40 Participation of President of Backpack US and expectations for the US market 
39:40 Expectations for the Japanese market 
43:18 Expectations for the EU market 
45:13 Reasons for being able to create this many products with a small team 
49:15 Reasons for building through "in-house development" rather than corporate acquisitions 
54:03 Message to Backpack users

legacy.full_text:

そして、なぜトークンの株式転換を行うのか？🎒 https://t.co/eDi27Qq2gd

result.text:
TGEを直前に控える @Backpack 今 ファウンダー・CEOの @armaniferrante は何を思うのか？今後の成長戦略と新規プロダクトの全容とは？米国・日本・EUそれぞれに期待する理由。

そして、なぜトークンの株式転換を行うのか？🎒

Backpackが解決する課題と提供する価値の根源が明確になるこのロングインタビュー。Backpackは暗号資産取引所の概念を根底から覆します。
_______________
